title: justicia altior
intro: Justicia altior, also known as the taller justicia or Mexican honeysuckle, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Justicia altior include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
